subcodes.title: Words to Arthur Agnew et al, spoken on 1907-04-13
subcodes.first_line: This is a prison and in prison one cannot find rest. Whatever it may be, this is a prison
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @effort; striving, @mind as principle emanation; activity of the human spirit, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
